who: legal firm payroll managers processing 5–15 employees/month
offer: For legal firm payroll managers processing 5–15 employees/month, manual preparation of tax reports causes late submissions and potential penalties. We simplify report preparation instead of manual preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate tax withholding reports leading to potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for payroll managers

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
